name: Honey Mustard Ranch Style Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 package Hidden Valley Ranch Style Dressing Mix
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 2 cups
Measure all ingredients into a small bowl. Whisk with a wire whisk until smooth. Taste and adjust the amount of honey to your preference. The Dijon mustard has a bit of a bite, so you may need more if you prefer a smoother dressing.
